디모데후서 2:1.content: You therefore, my child, be strengthened in the grace that is in Christ Jesus.

디모데후서 2:2.content: The things which you have heard from me among many witnesses, commit the same things to faithful men, who will be able to teach others also.

디모데후서 2:3.content: You therefore must endure hardship as a good soldier of Christ Jesus.

디모데후서 2:4.content: No soldier on duty entangles himself in the affairs of life, that he may please him who enrolled him as a soldier.

디모데후서 2:5.content: Also, if anyone competes in athletics, he isn’t crowned unless he has competed by the rules.

디모데후서 2:6.content: The farmer who labors must be the first to get a share of the crops.

디모데후서 2:7.content: Consider what I say, and may the Lord give you understanding in all things.

디모데후서 2:8.content: Remember Jesus Christ, risen from the dead, of the offspring of David, according to my Good News,

디모데후서 2:9.content: in which I suffer hardship to the point of chains as a criminal. But God’s word isn’t chained.

디모데후서 2:10.content: Therefore I endure all things for the chosen ones’ sake, that they also may obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.

디모데후서 2:11.content: This saying is trustworthy: “For if we died with him, we will also live with him.

디모데후서 2:12.content: If we endure, we will also reign with him. If we deny him, he also will deny us.

디모데후서 2:13.content: If we are faithless, he remains faithful; for he can’t deny himself.”

디모데후서 2:14.content: Remind them of these things, charging them in the sight of the Lord, that they don’t argue about words, to no profit, to the subverting of those who hear.

디모데후서 2:15.content: Give diligence to present yourself approved by God, a workman who doesn’t need to be ashamed, properly handling the Word of Truth.

디모데후서 2:16.content: But shun empty chatter, for it will go further in ungodliness,

디모데후서 2:17.content: and those words will consume like gangrene, of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus:

디모데후서 2:18.content: men who have erred concerning the truth, saying that the resurrection is already past, and overthrowing the faith of some.

디모데후서 2:19.content: However God’s firm foundation stands, having this seal, “The Lord knows those who are his,” and, “Let every one who names the name of the Lord depart from unrighteousness.”

디모데후서 2:20.content: Now in a large house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of clay. Some are for honor, and some for dishonor.

디모데후서 2:21.content: If anyone therefore purges himself from these, he will be a vessel for honor, sanctified, and suitable for the master’s use, prepared for every good work.

디모데후서 2:22.content: Flee from youthful lusts; but pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.

디모데후서 2:23.content: But refuse foolish and ignorant questionings, knowing that they generate strife.

디모데후서 2:24.content: The Lord’s servant must not quarrel, but be gentle toward all, able to teach, patient,

디모데후서 2:25.content: in gentleness correcting those who oppose him: perhaps God may give them repentance leading to a full knowledge of the truth,

디모데후서 2:26.content: and they may recover themselves out of the devil’s snare, having been taken captive by him to his will.
